display.purpose: Page-level names and report hero titles only.

headline.purpose: Main page titles and major state titles.

title.purpose: Card titles, panel titles, and section headings.

body.purpose: Forms, descriptions, reports, and explanatory copy.

label.purpose: Buttons, badges, filter labels, and compact metadata.

shadows.name: soft-surface
shadows.purpose: Light separation for headers and quiet cards.

shadows.name: interactive-lift
shadows.purpose: Hover feedback for clickable cards and list items.

shadows.name: overlay-lift
shadows.purpose: Menus, overlays, report hero panels, and mahjong table containers.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Default hover, focus, selected, loading, and reveal feedback.

motion.name: radix-overlay-transition
motion.purpose: Popover, select, dialog, and tooltip state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary command button for the single strongest action on a surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: #030213; color: #ffffff; font: 500 14px/1.5 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(3, 2, 19, 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(113, 113, 130, 0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action button for navigation, history, and non-primary commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 36px; padding: 8px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #030213; font: 500 14px/1.5 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 180ms ease-out, color 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #e9ebef; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(113, 113, 130, 0.5); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Standard text field for search, URLs, IDs, and form values.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" placeholder="输入 Tenhou URL 或牌谱 ID" />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 36px; min-width: 0; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-radius: 8px; background: #f8fafc; color: #030213; font: 400 14px/1.5 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #717182; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #717182; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(113, 113, 130, 0.5); }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Quiet content container for reports, history rows, and workflow panels.
components.html:
AI 复盘分析

导入牌谱后即可查看逐手复盘结果。
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-radius: 14px; background: #ffffff; color: #030213; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 500; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #717182; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(15,23,42,0.08); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Compact status marker for deviation, match quality, and category tags.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: fit-content; white-space: nowrap; gap: 4px; padding: 2px 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 8px; background: #ececf0; color: #030213; font: 500 12px/1.5 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-badge:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(113, 113, 130, 0.5); }

components.name: Mahjong Table Panel
components.description: Signature deep-green review table for replay and decision-state context.
components.html:
局面东1局 0 本场
第 8 巡需要复盘
5万赤5筒东
components.css: .ds-table { display: grid; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #064e3b; border-radius: 14px; background: #064e3b; color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(2,44,34,0.24); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-table-stat { padding: 12px; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(2,44,34,0.7); } .ds-table-stat span, .ds-table-center span { display: block; color: #a7f3d0; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-table-stat strong, .ds-table-center strong { display: block; margin-top: 4px; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-table-center { min-height: 96px; display: grid; place-items: center; text-align: center; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.45); border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(6,78,59,0.8); } .ds-tile-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: end; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-tile { display: inline-flex; width: 36px; height: 48px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 4px; background: #ffffff; color: #020617; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.12); } .ds-tile-red { color: #dc2626; } .ds-tile-active { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #7dd3fc, 0 0 0 3px #022c22; }

narrative.overview:
MahjongLab 的界面应该像一张安静、可信、随时可复盘的分析牌桌。它不是营销页，也不是炫技仪表盘；它是认真玩家完成导入、阅读报告、比较动作、积累错题和进入训练的工作台。视觉系统以浅色工作区为主体，使用深墨色承载主操作，使用低饱和中性色建立层级，再把深绿牌桌留给麻将状态和回放场景。

产品气质是简洁、专业、有高级感。趣味只出现在状态反馈、牌桌变化、回放进度和学习闭环的关键节点里。系统明确拒绝普通 AI 生成的紫蓝渐变、过多玻璃拟态、卡片套卡片，以及花哨但没意义的动效。
keyCharacteristics: 克制浅色工具界面，优先保证报告和牌桌信息可读。
深墨色主操作，蓝色只用于选择和聚焦，绿色只在麻将牌桌和正向状态里承担语义。
组件形态稳定，圆角适中，边框轻，阴影少。
动效服务加载、筛选、选中、回放和状态变化，不做页面入场表演。

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: 同一普通工具屏幕只允许一个主状态色占据注意力。报告筛选列表用蓝色选中，偏差状态用语义色，其他区域回到中性。

rules.name: The Table Green Rule
rules.body: 深绿只属于麻将牌桌、回放和局面状态。不要把它扩散成全站品牌背景。

rules.name: The No Purple Gradient Rule
rules.body: 禁止普通 AI 生成的紫蓝渐变。任何渐变都必须有明确场景含义，目前默认不用。

rules.name: The Native Tool Rule
rules.body: 使用系统 sans，保持产品界面的本机感。不要为装饰性高级感牺牲中文可读性和数据扫描效率。

rules.name: The Data First Rule
rules.body: 数字、动作、偏差和局面标签优先清晰。字体层级必须帮助玩家更快定位失误，而不是制造视觉表演。

rules.name: The Flat By Default Rule
rules.body: 静止界面默认平。阴影必须说明层级、hover、弹层或牌桌场景，不得为了高级感滥用。

rules.name: The No Glass Default Rule
rules.body: `backdrop-blur` 只允许用于粘性顶栏或浮层可读性，不作为装饰风格扩散。

dos: Do 保持工具型产品的克制：浅色工作区、轻边框、稳定组件和清晰数据优先。
Do 把深绿留给麻将牌桌、回放和局面状态，让它成为项目识别点。
Do 用颜色加文字共同表达偏差、成功、警告和错误，满足色盲可读性。
Do 使用 150 到 250ms 的状态动效表达 hover、focus、loading、筛选切换、回放进度和选中变化。
Do 使用 8px 到 14px 的圆角范围，除麻将牌张或小控件外不要突然改变组件词汇。
Do 让导入、复盘、回放、错题库、训练之间的路径始终可见。
donts: Don't 使用普通 AI 生成的紫蓝渐变。
Don't 使用过多玻璃拟态；`backdrop-blur` 只能服务顶栏或浮层可读性。
Don't 做卡片套卡片。需要分组时使用间距、边框、背景带或列表结构。
Don't 加入花哨但没意义的动效。没有状态含义的动效禁止出现。
Don't 使用彩色 `border-left` 或 `border-right` 侧边条作为卡片强调。
Don't 用渐变文字、装饰性 hero、重复 icon-card 网格或营销页布局包装产品工作流。
Don't 在按钮、标签、数据或表单里使用显示字体。
